IBS470_01.00.04_Variant_000002.ddt

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 74F
Recv ID: 757
Baudrate: 125000
Func Addr: E4
Func Name: IBS

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "512",
    "supplier": "1111",
    "soft": "2222",
    "version": "0000"
  },

    "diagversion": "513",

    "version": "0000"
  }
]
